rows.description: Computus Thoma Hinton, Rectoris, a 2d. die Novr. 1788 ad eundem diem resolutum 1789.
rows.notes: Page title at top. Handwriting clear and spans full width; no numerical columns on this line. Very legible year and names.
rows.section_header: Computus Thoma Hinton, Rectoris, a 2d. die Novr. 1788 ad eundem diem resolutum 1789.

rows.notes: Section heading below title. Word is slightly ambiguous (handwritten 'Arrearagia' / 'Arrearagia' / 'Arreariagia'), but clearly a heading and contains no amounts.
Description legible enough as a place/person and 'pro annus'. Amount columns well aligned; reads '05 19 0' clearly.
rows.english_description: Annual payment received from Garrington Sadler.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment received from Garrington Sadler, amounting to £5 19s 0d.

rows.notes: Description readable as 'Tintinhull Napier'. Amount appears as '05 1 1 1/4' — pence fraction looks like a small 'q' or '¼' after the 1; chosen as 0.25. Fraction recognition is moderately uncertain due to small loop.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Napier for Tintinhull.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Napier for Tintinhull, amounting to £5 1s 1.25d.

rows.description: Tintinhull olim Hobell and Saml. Beeton
rows.notes: Description reads as a longer name entry referencing Tintinhull and Beeton; some letters uncertain ('olim Hobell') but overall entry clear. Amount clearly '10 6 0'.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to Tintinhull formerly associated with Hobell and Samuel Beeton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to Tintinhull formerly associated with Hobell and Samuel Beeton, amounting to £10 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Large amount clearly aligned in pounds column as '113 16 0'. 'S. Newington Rect.' description legible; numbers unambiguous and validate correctly.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from the South Newington rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from the South Newington rectory, amounting to £113 16s 0d.

rows.notes: Shortened description 'S. New. Tenem. do.' appears as a related entry ('do.'). Amount '01 16 0' relatively clear though the abbreviation makes the description slightly ambiguous.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from the South Newington tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from the South Newington tenement, amounting to £1 16s 0d.

rows.notes: Place name reads as 'Berrington' (could be 'Berrington/Berrington'). Numbers read '04 12 11' with pence '11' clear and within valid range.
rows.english_description: Annual payment received for Berrington (rent).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment received for Berrington, amounting to £4 12s 11d.

rows.description: Gwinear Rect. pro dim. an. admid.
rows.notes: Description 'Gwinear Rect. pro dim. an. admid.' reasonably clear. Amount reads '30 0 0' unambiguously and aligns with pounds column.
rows.english_description: Half‑yearly payment from the Gwinear rectory (admitted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half‑yearly payment from the Gwinear rectory, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description is somewhat unclear ('Nodln/Nudln Ric.'); interpreted as a name plus 'pro annus'. Numeric '04 0 0' is clear in columns.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Richard (Nodln).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Richard Nodlin, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Place/name uncertain (reads 'Tetherin' or similar). Amount '03 0 0' is clear and columns are well aligned.
rows.english_description: Half‑yearly payment from Tetherin.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half‑yearly payment from Tetherin, amounting to £3 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description is hard to read ('Lad Lane longus' tentative). Amount reads '09 6 8' but handwriting of description and some of the digits is moderately ambiguous.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Lad Lane (long lease).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Lad Lane (long lease), amounting to £9 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Shortened entry 'Do.' indicates same category. Amount '06 13 4' readable though the first digit of pounds is slightly faded; column alignment supports reading.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received for Downthorne.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received for Downthorne, amounting to £6 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Entry 'Greenhow Do.' readable. Amount '01 13 4' clear; digits align with ruling columns and pence within valid range.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received for Greenhow.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received for Greenhow, amounting to £1 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Place appears as 'Bampton' (or 'Barrington/Bampton'); amount '07 0 0' is crisp and unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received for Bampton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received for Bampton, amounting to £7 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Place name slightly uncertain ('Medenham' reading); numeric '06 13 4' clear but description ambiguity reduces confidence.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received for Medenham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received for Medenham, amounting to £6 13s 4d.

rows.description: Sir G. P. Turner (Leven??) pro annus
rows.notes: Proper name 'Sir G. P. Turner' readable; parenthetical text uncertain. Amount '06 10 10' reads clearly in columns.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Sir G. P. Turner.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Sir G. P. Turner, amounting to £6 10s 10d.

rows.description: Kempston Hall (St. Mark Par.) pro 3 ann.
rows.notes: Description partly inferred ('Kempston Hall' variant and parish note). Amount '05 14 0' visible though some letters in description are indistinct.
rows.english_description: Payment from Kempston Hall in St Mark's parish covering three years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Kempston Hall (St Mark's parish) covering three years, amounting to £5 14s 0d.

rows.notes: Reads 'Bromley olim Keck'; 'olim' (formerly) is visible. Amount '02 16 8' clear and validates (shillings <20, pence <12).
rows.english_description: Payment for Bromley, formerly associated with Keck, covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for Bromley, formerly associated with Keck, covering two years, amounting to £2 16s 8d.

rows.notes: Description reads as 'Garington Rect. & Tenem.' (could be 'Gardington/Garsington'). Amount appears as '18 14 5 1/2' — the pence has an obvious half-penny mark; fraction interpretation (0.5) is plausible but faint, so confidence is low.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from the Garrington rectory and tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from the Garrington rectory and tenement, amounting to £18 14s 5.5d.

rows.notes: College entry 'Coll. Hertf.' (Hertford) readable. Amount '40 0 0' clearly written in pounds column; large and unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Payment received from Hertford College, noted for canons (inter‑college receipt).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received from Hertford College, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description appears to be 'Coll. Jesn' (possibly 'Coll. Jesus' or similar). Amount is uncertain in the image: the characters could be '00 10 0' or another value; chosen '00 10 0' because '00 40 0' would violate shilling limits. Very low confidence due to faded/faint digits.
rows.english_description: Annual payment received from Jesus College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment received from Jesus College, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.description: Taylor de parva Few pro annus
rows.notes: Description 'Taylor de parva Few' (parva = small) readable though somewhat old Latinized. Amount reads '05 0 8' clearly in columns.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Taylor of Parva Few.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Taylor of Parva Few, amounting to £5 0s 8d.

rows.notes: Name looks like 'Wild Anish' (could be variant spelling). Amount '05 0 0' is clear.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Wild Anish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Wild Anish, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Final total line at bottom reads 'Summa ann. receptor.' Amount appears as '258 5 1 3/4' (pence = 1 with three-quarters). Fraction '3/4' interpreted as 0.75; alignment with prior amounts supports reading.
